'''Condi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Zoraster]] in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was taken as a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] by the [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] crime-lord [[Krayn]] and forced to work, under penalty of death, as a [[Security guard/Legends|guard]] upon his [[Krayn's pirate starship|pirate ship]].

When Krayn attacked [[Anf Dec]]'s [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoid]] [[Colicoid cargo ship|cargo ship]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], Condi encountered [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] when the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] infiltrated the attackers' ship. Kenobi, against their plea, was unable to free Condi or his comrades at the [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="JQ 2" /> But when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] later encouraged Krayn's slaves to rebel against him on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], Condi at last achieved his freedom.<ref name="JQ 4">[[Jedi Quest 4|''Jedi Quest'' 4]]</ref>
